evals.prompt: audit your thinking for errors, omissions, oversights, blind spots, duplications or room for improvement. when an observation earns its place, update the plan in light of it
evals.expected_output: Runs the six-lens adversarial pass on the most recent artifact, presents survivors AND discards (each discard with a one-line reason), fixes survivors at root cause, updates the plan, reports finding→root-cause→fix lines.

evals.prompt: review and audit SPEC.md for blindspots, oversights, or areas for improvement — just report, don't change anything yet
evals.expected_output: Detects report-only mode, stops after the earn filter: survivors with concrete failure scenarios, discards with reasons. No edits made.

evals.prompt: the line edit phase is still throwing errors. find and fix the root cause
evals.expected_output: Traces the defect to the shared choke point (greps all callers/paths before editing), makes one fix where all paths route through rather than patching the reported path, ripples doc updates, re-verifies and reports evidence faithfully.
